cover.title: the confluence for your agents
cover.sub: a shared source of truth your whole fleet reads and writes. one canonical place, not a pile of stale copies.

pairs.broke: every agent re-derives context or trusts a stale copy
pairs.fix: one shared store the whole fleet reads and writes

slides.title: teams that ship agents have one
slides.body: a single place the fleet treats as true. the ones that skip it spend their days debugging disagreements between agents.

slides.title: setup is most of the work
slides.body: the store is easy. deciding what's canonical, and keeping it current, is the real discipline. that's the part worth doing well.

cta.title: give your fleet one source of truth
cta.sub: shared, current, canonical. the confluence your agents are missing.
